title: Add onboarding version tracking helpers
description: Create the version metadata helper module that writes and reads `.takt/version.json` and computes repo-versus-installed version drift using lightweight tuple parsing, including pre-release suffix handling and missing-file warnings.
acceptance_criteria: A new onboarding helper exposes `write_version_file(project_root)`, `read_version_file(project_root)`, and `check_version_drift(project_root)` with the schema required by the spec.
Version comparison correctly orders patch versions such as `0.1.9 < 0.1.10` and handles non-numeric suffixes on the last component without adding a new dependency.
Missing or unreadable version files return `None` from the reader and produce the expected upgrade guidance from drift checking instead of raising.
